overview: Professional stock portfolio tracker in French with 100 major international companies. Financial data is fetched server-side (no CORS issues), with interactive charts, transaction management, and a buy-the-dip opportunities page.
features: 100 major international companies with server-side data fetching
Interactive OHLCV charts with zoom and custom horizontal lines
Transaction management with buy/sell tracking and P&L calculation
Opportunités page for identifying buy-the-dip opportunities
Dark/light mode with responsive sidebar navigation
All data persisted in localStorage, French UI throughout
